mapper.select: SELECT id, pattern_key AS patternKey, occurrence_count AS occurrenceCount, last_seen_at AS lastSeenAt, sample_trace_ids AS sampleTraceIds, resolution_hint AS resolutionHint, created_at AS createdAt FROM trace_failure_patterns WHERE pattern_key = #{patternKey} LIMIT 1

SELECT id, pattern_key AS patternKey, occurrence_count AS occurrenceCount, last_seen_at AS lastSeenAt, sample_trace_ids AS sampleTraceIds, resolution_hint AS resolutionHint, created_at AS createdAt FROM trace_failure_patterns ORDER BY occurrence_count DESC, last_seen_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
